meta.tagline: Your factory automation solution. Engineered in Selangor.

home.heroH1: Engineered in Malaysia. Built to outlast the line.
home.heroSub: Self-adhesive labelling machines, packaging machinery and custom automation for ASEAN manufacturers. Designed, built, installed and serviced from our floor in Shah Alam.

items.title: Built here.
items.body: Local manufacturing, local engineers, local support. 4-week delivery instead of months from China.

items.title: End-to-end automation.
items.body: Labelling, packaging, 3D printing, MES & SCADA — engineered as one solution, not bolted-on pieces.

items.title: Custom by default.
items.body: Every floor is different. We engineer to your container, your throughput, your existing line.

machineFinderCta.title: Not sure which machine?
machineFinderCta.body: Describe your product and your line. We'll recommend the right machine, configuration, and lead time.

items.a: Standard machines ship in 4 weeks from order confirmation. Custom builds are typically 8–12 weeks.
Yes. Every machine includes on-site installation, line integration, and operator training across Peninsular Malaysia, Sabah, and Sarawak.
Two years parts and labour, with optional extended-coverage plans up to five years.
Yes — every machine can be tailored to your container shape, throughput target, label material, and existing line topology. Bring a sample to our Shah Alam floor — we'll engineer to your reality.
Yes — we ship across ASEAN with full CE, SIRIM, and origin documentation.

items.q: What containers do your labellers support?
items.a: Round, oval, square, conical, and custom shapes from 30mm to 250mm diameter. Wrap-around, front-and-back, top, and bottom labelling supported.

forms.name: Name
forms.thanks: Thanks — we'll be in touch within one business day.

footer.rights: © 2026 Auraplex SDN BHD. All rights reserved.

about.p1: Auraplex is an engineering company in Shah Alam, Selangor. We design, build, install and support self-adhesive labelling machines, packaging machinery, 3D printers and custom automation for manufacturers across ASEAN — under one roof, with one team.
about.p2: The model is simple. Manufacturers don't need cheaper machines — they need machines that don't strand them when a sensor fails on a Tuesday night. We staff full-time engineers locally. Parts ship from a warehouse you can drive to. Service calls get an engineer on the floor, not a ticket number.
about.p3: The catalogue covers labelling machines, packaging machinery, 3D printers, MES & SCADA solutions, and bespoke automation rigs. What ties them together isn't a product family — it's that they're engineered by people who'll be on your floor on installation day, and on a WhatsApp call when something needs servicing.

tour.body: The fastest way to understand an Auraplex machine is to watch one being built. Walk the floor with our chief engineer. Bring a sample container — we'll run it on the closest applicator while you watch.
tour.address: Auraplex SDN BHD · Shah Alam · Selangor · Malaysia
tour.whatsappMsg: Hi — I'd like to book a factory tour.

services.subtitle: Every Auraplex install includes commissioning, operator handover, and a local service engineer on call. Four disciplines, all under one roof in Shah Alam.

cta.body: We service third-party labellers too. Send us the model and photographs of the issue — we'll quote within one business day.
cta.whatsappMsg: Hi — I need service on a machine. Can I send photos?

careers.subtitle: Auraplex employs engineers, technicians, installers and service specialists across six disciplines in Shah Alam. We hire when the work demands it — small team, real ownership.

internships.body: We host 6 – 8 undergraduate interns per year. You'll work on machines currently being built — not training rigs, not sandbox projects. Open to Malaysian universities and ASEAN exchange students.

cv.body: We keep a rolling shortlist. When we're ready to hire, the shortlist is where we start. Email your CV with a short note about which discipline interests you most.

news.subtitle: Exhibitions, awards, partnerships, new machine releases. Updates from Auraplex go here — quarterly, honest, no marketing fluff.

empty.body: We'd rather wait until we have news worth telling. In the meantime — talk to the engineers who'll be in the first issue.

article.body: Auraplex news lands quarterly. Head back to the index for the latest, or talk to us directly.

contact.subtitle: We respond within one business day. For urgent matters, WhatsApp is fastest.

response.body: within 1 business day by email · within the hour on WhatsApp during business hours.

caseStudies.subtitle: Auraplex field reports are long-form, photographed on-site, and published quarterly. We'd rather ship one honest story than twelve press releases.

items.title: On the floor
items.body: Every report is photographed in the customer's plant — not in our showroom.

items.title: With numbers
items.body: Throughput before / after. Reject rate before / after. Payback in months, not narrative.

items.title: And the snags
items.body: What the install missed, what the second iteration fixed, what we learned for the next build.

cta.h2: Want the first issue when it lands?
cta.body: Or skip the wait — talk to the engineers who'll be in the report. We'll walk you through what works on real floors.

detail.body: Auraplex field reports are produced quarterly, on-site, with real throughput numbers. The first issue is in editorial. Sign up to get it when it lands — or skip the wait and talk to the team directly.

machineFinder.h1: Describe your line. We'll match the machine.
machineFinder.subtitle: Talk to our AI application engineer. Trained on the Auraplex catalogue and 340+ deployed installations. Every recommendation is reviewed by a human engineer within 24 hours.
